session.user: Load and follow the skill instructions in .claude/skills/pr-feedback-classifier/SKILL.md Arguments: --pr 8799 Return the complete JSON output as your final message.
session.assistant: I'll load the skill and execute it to classify PR feedback for PR 8799.
session.tool_result:
1→--- 2→name: pr-feedback-classifier 3→description: > 4→ Fetches and classifies PR review feedback with context isolation. 5→ Returns structured JSON with thread IDs for deterministic resolution. 6→ Use when analyzing PR comments before addressing them. 7→argument-hint: "[--pr <number>] [--include-resolved]" 8→context: fork 9→agent: general-purpose 10→model: sonnet 11→--- 12→ 13→# PR Feedback Classifier 14→ 15→Fetch and classify all PR review feedback for the current branch's PR. 16→ 17→## Arguments 18→ 19→- `--pr <number>`: Target a specific PR by number (default: current branch's PR) 20→- `--include-resolved`: Include resolved threads (for reference) 21→ 22→Check `$ARGUMENTS` for flags. 23→ 24→## Critical Constraints 25→ 26→**DO NOT write Python scripts or any code files.** Classify the data using direct AI reasoning only. Writing code to process JSON is unnecessary and pollutes the filesystem. 27→ 28→## Steps 29→ 30→1. **Fetch PR info and all comments in a single call:**
... [194 lines omitted] ...

**Branch:** `plnd/consolidate-learn-docs-03-06-0120`", "url": "https://github.com/dagster-io/erk/pull/8799#issuecomment-4008890030" }, { "id": 4008939162, "author": "github-actions[bot]", "body": "<!-- audit-pr-docs -->

## ❌ Audit PR Docs

**Last updated:** 2026-03-06 16:51:37 PT

Found 2 violations across 2 files. Inline comments posted for each.

<details>
<summary>Details</summary>

### Patterns Checked
❌ INACCURATE claims — Found in docs/learned/architecture/checked-out-branch-handling.md:22
❌ DRIFT RISK sections — Found in docs/learned/cli/pr-submit-pipeline.md:50
✅ VERBATIM code blocks — None found
✅ DUPLICATIVE sections — None found

### Violations Summary
- `docs/learned/architecture/checked-out-branch-handling.md:22`: Inaccurate source path — `src/erk/gateway/git/worktree.py` doesn't exist; actual path is `packages/erk-shared/src/erk_shared/gateway/git/worktree/abc.py`
- `docs/learned/cli/pr-submit-pipeline.md:50`: Drift risk — source pointer includes `lines 186-204` suffix that will drift; use name-based pointer only

### Verdicts
| File | Verdict | Duplicative % | High Value % | Issues |
|------|---------|---------------|-------------|--------|
| `docs/learned/architecture/checked-out-branch-handling.md` | KEEP | 0% | 90% | 1 inaccurate path |
| `docs/learned/cli/command-promotion.md` | KEEP | 0% | 100% | 0 |
| `docs/learned/cli/rich-table-output.md` | KEEP | 5% | 95% | 0 |
| `docs/learned/cli/pr-submit-pipeline.md` | KEEP | 0% | 100% | 1 drift risk (line numbers) |
| `docs/learned/planning/incremental-dispatch.md` | KEEP | 0% | 100% | 0 |
| `docs/learned/refactoring/coordinated-rename.md` | KEEP | 0% | 100% | 0 |
| `docs/learned/textual/quirks.md` | KEEP | 0% | 100% | 0 (new section clean) |
| `docs/learned/tui/filter-toggle-pattern.md` | KEEP | 0% | 100% | 0 (all verbatim blocks resolved) |

### Files Reviewed
- `docs/learned/architecture/checked-out-branch-handling.md`: 1 violation
- `docs/learned/cli/command-promotion.md`: 0 violations
- `docs/learned/cli/rich-table-output.md`: 0 violations
- `docs/learned/cli/pr-submit-pipeline.md`: 1 violation

- `docs/learned/textual/quirks.md`: 0 violations
- `docs/learned/tui/filter-toggle-pattern.md`: 0 violations

---

### Activity Log
- **2026-03-06 16:51:37 PT**: Found 2 violations: inaccurate source path in checked-out-branch-handling.md:22 (src/erk/gateway/git/worktree.py doesn't exist, should be packages/erk-shared/...), drift risk in pr-submit-pipeline.md:50 (line numbers in source pointer)

session.assistant:
## Summary
I've successfully executed the pr-feedback-classifier skill for PR 8799 and analyzed all feedback. Here are the key findings:
**PR Details:** - PR Number: 8799 - Title: "Consolidate documentation from 11 erk-learn plans" - URL: https://github.com/dagster-io/erk/pull/8799
**Feedback Analysis:** The PR has no active review threads, but the audit-pr-docs bot comment identified 2 actionable documentation violations and 3 informational status comments:
1. **Inaccurate Source Path** (local fix) - `docs/learned/architecture/checked-out-branch-handling.md:22` - Current path reference: `src/erk/gateway/git/worktree.py` (doesn't exist) - Should be: `packages/erk-shared/src/erk_shared/gateway/git/worktree/abc.py`
2. **Drift Risk** (local fix) - `docs/learned/cli/pr-submit-pipeline.md:50` - Issue: Source pointer includes line numbers (`lines 186-204`) that will drift when code changes - Fix: Use name-based pointer only without line number suffix
**Batching:** Both issues are classified as "Local Fixes" with `auto_proceed: true`, meaning they can be resolved automatically as single-line changes in their respective files.
**Informational Comments:** 3 (workflow status updates from GitHub Actions and schrockn's manual queue submission)
---
```json { "success": true, "pr_number": 8799, "pr_title": "Consolidate documentation from 11 erk-learn plans", "pr_url": "https://github.com/dagster-io/erk/pull/8799", "actionable_threads": [], "discussion_actions": [ { "comment_id": 4008939162, "action_summary": "Fix inaccurate source path in docs/learned/architecture/checked-out-branch-handling.md:22 - should point to packages/erk-shared/src/erk_shared/gateway/git/worktree/abc.py instead of src/erk/gateway/git/worktree.py", "complexity": "local", "original_comment": "Inaccurate source path — `src/erk/gateway/git/worktree.py` doesn't exist; actual path is `packages/erk-shared/src/erk_shared/gateway/git/worktree/abc.py`" }, { "comment_id": 4008939162, "action_summary": "Fix drift risk in docs/learned/cli/pr-submit-pipeline.md:50 - remove line number suffix from source pointer, use name-based pointer only", "complexity": "local", "original_comment": "Drift risk — source pointer includes `lines 186-204` suffix that will drift; use name-based pointer only" } ], "informational_count": 3, "batches": [ { "name": "Local Fixes", "complexity": "local", "auto_proceed": true, "item_indices": [0, 1] }, { "name": "Single-File", "complexity": "single_file", "auto_proceed": true, "item_indices": [] }, { "name": "Cross-Cutting", "complexity": "cross_cutting", "auto_proceed": false, "item_indices": [] }, { "name": "Complex", "complexity": "complex", "auto_proceed": false, "item_indices": [] }, { "name": "Informational", "complexity": "informational", "auto_proceed": false, "item_indices": [] } ], "error": null } ```
